hypothesis: Training template-free retrosynthesis models (e.g., MEGAN and RootAligned) with template-aware class rebalancing using inverse-square-root template-frequency loss weighting will increase their top-10 accuracy on out-of-distribution Pistachio OOD reactions by at least fivefold versus unweighted training while changing top-5 round-trip accuracy on the in-distribution USPTO-retro test by no more than ±2 percentage points.
